member.name: T:Telerik.WinControls.UI.CameraSetting
member.summary: Represents a single setting on a .

member.name: F:Telerik.WinControls.UI.CameraSetting.components
member.summary: Required designer variable.

member.name: M:Telerik.WinControls.UI.CameraSetting.Dispose(System.Boolean)
member.summary: Clean up any resources being used.
member.param: true if managed resources should be disposed; otherwise, false.

member.name: M:Telerik.WinControls.UI.CameraSetting.InitializeComponent
member.summary: Required method for Designer support - do not modify the contents of this method with the code editor.

member.name: T:Telerik.WinControls.UI.CameraSettingsDialog
member.summary: Represents a settings dialog for the control.

member.summary: Raises the System.Windows.Forms.Form.Load event.

member.name: F:Telerik.WinControls.UI.CameraSettingsDialog.components
member.summary: Required designer variable.

member.name: M:Telerik.WinControls.UI.CameraSettingsDialog.Dispose(System.Boolean)
member.summary: Clean up any resources being used.
member.param: true if managed resources should be disposed; otherwise, false.

member.summary: Required method for Designer support - do not modify the contents of this method with the code editor.

member.name: T:Telerik.WinControls.UI.CameraErrorEventArgs
member.summary: Contains state information and event data associated with a camera error event.

member.name: M:Telerik.WinControls.UI.CameraErrorEventArgs.#ctor(Telerik.WinControls.UI.ErrorInfo)
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the class.

member.name: P:Telerik.WinControls.UI.CameraErrorEventArgs.Error
member.summary: Gets the info associated with this error.

member.name: T:Telerik.WinControls.UI.CameraErrorState
member.summary: Represents the type of error RadWebCam encountered.

member.name: F:Telerik.WinControls.UI.CameraErrorState.NoCamera
member.summary: The are no cameras detected.

member.name: F:Telerik.WinControls.UI.CameraErrorState.CameraIsBusy
member.summary: The camera is currently unavailable.

member.name: F:Telerik.WinControls.UI.CameraErrorState.CameraAccessDenied
member.summary: Access to the camera is denied.

member.name: T:Telerik.WinControls.UI.ErrorInfo
member.summary: Contains error information.

member.name: M:Telerik.WinControls.UI.ErrorInfo.#ctor(System.String,Telerik.WinControls.UI.CameraErrorState)
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the class.

member.name: P:Telerik.WinControls.UI.ErrorInfo.Message
member.summary: Gets or sets the message associated with this error.

member.name: P:Telerik.WinControls.UI.ErrorInfo.ErrorState
member.summary: Gets the cause of this error.

member.name: M:Telerik.WinControls.UI.ErrorInfo.ToString
member.summary: Returns a string that represents the current object.

member.name: T:Telerik.WinControls.UI.CameraSettingsDialogShowingEventArgs
member.summary: Contains the event data of a settings dialog showing event.

member.name: M:Telerik.WinControls.UI.CameraSettingsDialogShowingEventArgs.#ctor(Telerik.WinControls.UI.CameraSettingsDialog)
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the class.
member.param: The dialog to be shown.

member.name: P:Telerik.WinControls.UI.CameraSettingsDialogShowingEventArgs.SettingsDialog
member.summary: Gets or sets the dialog that will be shown.

member.name: T:Telerik.WinControls.UI.SnapshotTakenEventArgs
member.summary: Contains state information and event data associated with a snapshot taken event.

member.name: M:Telerik.WinControls.UI.SnapshotTakenEventArgs.#ctor(System.Drawing.Image)
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the class.

member.name: P:Telerik.WinControls.UI.SnapshotTakenEventArgs.Snapshot
member.summary: Gets the snapshot that has been taken.

member.name: T:Telerik.WinControls.UI.Localization.RadWebCamLocalizationProvider
member.summary: Provides localization services for RadWebCam

member.name: M:Telerik.WinControls.UI.Localization.RadWebCamLocalizationProvider.GetLocalizedString(System.String)
member.summary: Gets the string corresponding to the given ID.
member.param: String ID
member.returns: The string corresponding to the given ID.

member.name: T:Telerik.WinControls.UI.Localization.RadWebCamStringId
member.summary: Represents localization strings in RadWebCam.

member.name: T:Telerik.WinControls.UI.RadWebCam
member.summary: Represents a web cam control that displays the stream provided by a web cam.

member.name: M:Telerik.WinControls.UI.RadWebCam.#ctor
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the class with default settings. The control will automatically start the first detected webcam when loaded.

member.name: M:Telerik.WinControls.UI.RadWebCam.#ctor(System.Boolean)
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the class in simulation mode.
member.param: When set to true, the control will operate in simulation mode without requiring actual hardware.

member.name: M:Telerik.WinControls.UI.RadWebCam.CreateChildItems(Telerik.WinControls.RadElement)
member.summary: Creates and initializes the child elements of the control.
member.param: The root element of the control's element tree.

member.name: M:Telerik.WinControls.UI.RadWebCam.CreateRootElement
member.summary: Creates the root RadElement of the control.

member.name: M:Telerik.WinControls.UI.RadWebCam.CreateWebCamRootElement
member.summary: Creates the root element of .

member.name: M:Telerik.WinControls.UI.RadWebCam.CreateWebCamElement
member.summary: Creates the main element.

member.name: M:Telerik.WinControls.UI.RadWebCam.CreateSnapshotPreviewElement
member.summary: Creates the snapshot preview element.

member.name: M:Telerik.WinControls.UI.RadWebCam.CreateCameraBorderElement
member.summary: Creates the camera border element.

member.name: P:Telerik.WinControls.UI.RadWebCam.WebCamElement
member.summary: Gets the main web cam control element.

member.name: P:Telerik.WinControls.UI.RadWebCam.SnapshotPreviewElement
member.summary: Gets the element used to display snapshot previews or error messages.

member.name: P:Telerik.WinControls.UI.RadWebCam.CameraBorderElement
member.summary: Gets the element representing the border of the camera.

member.name: P:Telerik.WinControls.UI.RadWebCam.HasError
member.summary: Gets a value indicating whether the camera is in a state where something is preventing normal operation.

member.name: P:Telerik.WinControls.UI.RadWebCam.IsRecording
member.summary: Gets or sets a value indicating whether the source content is being recorded to a file.

member.name: P:Telerik.WinControls.UI.RadWebCam.IsPreviewingSnapshot
member.summary: Gets or sets a value indicating whether the control is in snapshot preview mode.

member.name: P:Telerik.WinControls.UI.RadWebCam.PreviewSnapshots
member.summary: Gets or sets whether the control will go into preview mode when a snapshot is taken.

member.name: P:Telerik.WinControls.UI.RadWebCam.AutoStart
member.summary: Gets or sets whether the control will automatically start the first webcam it finds when the control is loaded.

member.name: P:Telerik.WinControls.UI.RadWebCam.ControlPanelHeight
member.summary: Gets or sets the height of the panel with the camera controls.

member.name: P:Telerik.WinControls.UI.RadWebCam.RecordingFilePath
member.summary: Gets or sets the file path where video files are saved when recording from the webcam. Must be set before calling method.

member.name: P:Telerik.WinControls.UI.RadWebCam.VideoRecordingElapsedTimeFormat
member.summary: Gets or sets the format string for displaying elapsed time during video recording. Uses standard DateTime format strings.

member.name: M:Telerik.WinControls.UI.RadWebCam.GetAudioCaptureDevices
member.summary: Gets a list with all the available audio capture devices on the system.
member.returns: A read-only collection of audio capture devices available on the system.

member.name: M:Telerik.WinControls.UI.RadWebCam.GetVideoCaptureDevices
member.summary: Gets a list with all the available video capture devices (webcams) on the system.
member.returns: A read-only collection of video capture devices available on the system.

member.name: M:Telerik.WinControls.UI.RadWebCam.GetVideoFormats(Telerik.Windows.MediaFoundation.MediaFoundationDeviceInfo,System.Boolean)
member.summary: Gets a list with all the available video file formats for the provided capture device.
member.param: The device for which to get the available formats.
If set to true - only formats that allow saving to a video file will be returned.
member.returns: A read-only collection of video formats supported by the specified device.

member.name: M:Telerik.WinControls.UI.RadWebCam.Initialize(Telerik.Windows.MediaFoundation.MediaFoundationDeviceInfo,Telerik.Windows.MediaFoundation.MediaFoundationVideoFormatInfo)
member.summary: Starts up the video pipeline and displays the video from the source inside of the control.
member.param: The device to use as a video source.
The format from the video source.

member.name: M:Telerik.WinControls.UI.RadWebCam.Initialize(Telerik.Windows.MediaFoundation.MediaFoundationDeviceInfo,Telerik.Windows.MediaFoundation.MediaFoundationVideoFormatInfo,Telerik.Windows.MediaFoundation.MediaFoundationDeviceInfo)
member.summary: Starts up the video pipeline and displays the video from the source inside of the control with audio support.
member.param: The device to use as a video source.
The format from the video source.
The device to use as an audio source.
member.exception: Thrown when videoDevice or videoFormat is null.

member.name: M:Telerik.WinControls.UI.RadWebCam.ShutDown
member.summary: Shuts down the video pipeline.

member.name: M:Telerik.WinControls.UI.RadWebCam.Start
member.summary: Starts the video pipeline and starts displaying the video feed.

member.name: M:Telerik.WinControls.UI.RadWebCam.Pause
member.summary: Pauses the video pipeline and pauses displaying the video feed.

member.name: M:Telerik.WinControls.UI.RadWebCam.Stop
member.summary: Stops the video pipeline and stops displaying the video feed.

member.name: M:Telerik.WinControls.UI.RadWebCam.StartRecording
member.summary: Starts capturing the media source(s) to a file. The property must be set before calling this method.

member.name: M:Telerik.WinControls.UI.RadWebCam.StopRecording
member.summary: Stops the file capture.

member.name: M:Telerik.WinControls.UI.RadWebCam.TakeSnapshot
member.summary: Takes a snapshot from the currently displayed webcam video feed. If is true, the snapshot will be displayed for preview before firing the event. Otherwise, the event will be fired immediately.

member.name: M:Telerik.WinControls.UI.RadWebCam.SaveSnapshot
member.summary: Triggers the event when the control is in preview snapshot mode.

member.name: M:Telerik.WinControls.UI.RadWebCam.DiscardSnapshot
member.summary: Discards the taken snapshot when the control is in preview snapshot mode.

member.name: M:Telerik.WinControls.UI.RadWebCam.ShowSettingsDialog
member.summary: Shows the camera settings dialog which allows configuring camera properties. The event can be used to customize or cancel the dialog.

member.name: M:Telerik.WinControls.UI.RadWebCam.Dispose(System.Boolean)
member.summary: Releases the unmanaged resources used by the control and its child controls and optionally releases the managed resources.
member.param: true to release both managed and unmanaged resources; false to release only unmanaged resources.

member.name: P:Telerik.WinControls.UI.RadWebCam.DefaultSize
member.summary: Gets the default size of the control.

member.name: M:Telerik.WinControls.UI.RadWebCam.StartRecordingCore
member.summary: Starts capturing the content of the source(s) to a file. This call must be made in a new thread as Windows Media Foundation must run in a MTAThread and WPF is STAThread.

member.name: M:Telerik.WinControls.UI.RadWebCam.StopRecordingCore
member.summary: Stops capturing the content of the source(s) to a file. This call must be made in a new thread as Windows Media Foundation must run in a MTAThread and WPF is STAThread.

member.name: M:Telerik.WinControls.UI.RadWebCam.InvalidatePlayerPosition
member.summary: Invalidates the rectangle where the MF player paints the webcam stream.

member.name: E:Telerik.WinControls.UI.RadWebCam.SnapshotTaken
member.summary: Occurs when a snapshot is taken from the webcam. If is set to true, the event is fired only when the method is called.

member.name: M:Telerik.WinControls.UI.RadWebCam.OnSnapshotTaken(Telerik.WinControls.UI.SnapshotTakenEventArgs)
member.summary: Fires the event.
member.param: The event arguments.

member.name: E:Telerik.WinControls.UI.RadWebCam.CameraError
member.summary: Occurs when an error is preventing the camera from operating normally.

member.name: M:Telerik.WinControls.UI.RadWebCam.OnCameraError(Telerik.WinControls.UI.CameraErrorEventArgs)
member.summary: Fires the event.
member.param: The event arguments.

member.name: E:Telerik.WinControls.UI.RadWebCam.RecordingStarted
member.summary: Occurs when video recording is started.

member.name: M:Telerik.WinControls.UI.RadWebCam.OnRecordingStarted(System.ComponentModel.CancelEventArgs)
member.summary: Fires the event.
member.param: The event arguments.

member.name: E:Telerik.WinControls.UI.RadWebCam.RecordingEnded
member.summary: Occurs when video recording has ended.

member.name: M:Telerik.WinControls.UI.RadWebCam.OnRecordingEnded(System.EventArgs)
member.summary: Fires the event.
member.param: The event arguments.

member.name: E:Telerik.WinControls.UI.RadWebCam.SettingsDialogShowing
member.summary: Occurs when the settings dialog is about to be shown.

member.name: M:Telerik.WinControls.UI.RadWebCam.OnSettingsDialogShowing(Telerik.WinControls.UI.CameraSettingsDialogShowingEventArgs)
member.summary: Fires the event.
member.param: The event arguments.

member.name: M:Telerik.WinControls.UI.RadWebCam.OnHandleCreated(System.EventArgs)
member.summary: Raises the System.Windows.Forms.Control.HandleCreated event and initializes the default webcam if available.
member.param: An that contains the event data.

member.name: M:Telerik.WinControls.UI.RadWebCam.OnLoad(System.Drawing.Size)
member.summary: Notifies that the control is about to be visualized and initializes the webcam position.
member.param: The desired size of the control.

member.name: M:Telerik.WinControls.UI.RadWebCam.SetBoundsCore(System.Int32,System.Int32,System.Int32,System.Int32,System.Windows.Forms.BoundsSpecified)
member.summary: Performs the work of setting the specified bounds of this control and updates the webcam stream position.
member.param: The new x-coordinate of the control.
The new y-coordinate of the control.
The new width of the control.
The new height of the control.
A bitwise combination of values.

member.name: T:Telerik.WinControls.UI.RadWebCamElement
member.summary: Represents the UI that users can interact with in a control.

member.name: M:Telerik.WinControls.UI.RadWebCamElement.#ctor(Telerik.WinControls.UI.RadWebCam)
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the class.
member.param: The control that owns this element.

member.name: M:Telerik.WinControls.UI.RadWebCamElement.CreateChildElements
member.summary: Called by the element when constructed. Allows inheritors to build the element tree.

member.name: M:Telerik.WinControls.UI.RadWebCamElement.CreateLeftElementsStack
member.summary: Creates the .
member.returns: A new configured for the left elements.

member.summary: Creates the .
member.returns: A new configured for the center elements.

member.summary: Creates the .
member.returns: A new configured for the right elements.

member.summary: Creates the .
member.returns: A new configured as a take snapshot button.

member.name: M:Telerik.WinControls.UI.RadWebCamElement.CreateSaveSnapshotButton
member.summary: Creates the .
member.returns: A new configured as a save snapshot button.

member.name: M:Telerik.WinControls.UI.RadWebCamElement.CreateDiscardSnapshotButton
member.summary: Creates the .
member.returns: A new configured as a discard snapshot button.

member.name: M:Telerik.WinControls.UI.RadWebCamElement.CreateToggleRecordingButton
member.summary: Creates the .
member.returns: A new configured as a toggle recording button.

member.name: M:Telerik.WinControls.UI.RadWebCamElement.CreateSettingsButton
member.summary: Creates the .
member.returns: A new configured as a settings button.

member.name: M:Telerik.WinControls.UI.RadWebCamElement.CreateRecordingTimeLabel
member.summary: Creates the .
member.returns: A new configured as a recording time label.

member.name: M:Telerik.WinControls.UI.RadWebCamElement.CreateRecordingDotElement
member.summary: Creates the .
member.returns: A new configured as a recording dot indicator.

member.name: P:Telerik.WinControls.UI.RadWebCamElement.LeftElementsStack
member.summary: Gets the left elements stack.

member.name: P:Telerik.WinControls.UI.RadWebCamElement.CenterElementsStack
member.summary: Gets the center elements stack.

member.name: P:Telerik.WinControls.UI.RadWebCamElement.RightElementsStack
member.summary: Gets the right elements stack.

member.name: P:Telerik.WinControls.UI.RadWebCamElement.TakeSnapshotButton
member.summary: Gets the take snapshot button element.

member.name: P:Telerik.WinControls.UI.RadWebCamElement.SaveSnapshotButton
member.summary: Gets the save snapshot button element.

member.name: P:Telerik.WinControls.UI.RadWebCamElement.DiscardSnapshotButton
member.summary: Gets the discard snapshot button element.

member.name: P:Telerik.WinControls.UI.RadWebCamElement.ToggleRecordingButton
member.summary: Gets the toggle recording button element.

member.name: P:Telerik.WinControls.UI.RadWebCamElement.SettingsButton
member.summary: Gets the settings button element.

member.name: P:Telerik.WinControls.UI.RadWebCamElement.RecordingTimeLabel
member.summary: Gets the recording time label element.

member.name: P:Telerik.WinControls.UI.RadWebCamElement.RecordingDotElement
member.summary: Gets the recording dot visual element.

member.name: P:Telerik.WinControls.UI.RadWebCamElement.IsPreviewingSnapshot
member.summary: Gets a value indicating whether the component is curently in preview a snapshot mode.

member.name: P:Telerik.WinControls.UI.RadWebCamElement.IsSimulationMode
member.summary: Gets or sets a value indicating whether the control is in simulation mode.

member.name: M:Telerik.WinControls.UI.RadWebCamElement.ShouldArrangeChild(Telerik.WinControls.RadElement)
member.summary: Determines whether a given child should be arranged. For example when base.ArrangeOverride is called, but we have custom layout logic for current element.
member.param: The child element to determine arrangement for.
member.returns: true if the child should be arranged; otherwise, false.

member.name: M:Telerik.WinControls.UI.RadWebCamElement.ArrangeOverride(System.Drawing.SizeF)
member.summary: Arranges the child elements of the control.
member.param: The final size that the parent element can allocate to the child element.
member.returns: The actual size used by the element.

member.name: M:Telerik.WinControls.UI.RadWebCamElement.SetIsPreviewingSnapshot(System.Boolean)
member.summary: Sets up the control for displaying a snapshot or reverting to normal camera view.
member.param: When set to true, configures the control to preview snapshot mode; when false, returns to normal camera view mode.

member.name: M:Telerik.WinControls.UI.RadWebCamElement.TakeSnapshot_Click(System.Object,System.EventArgs)
member.summary: Called when the is clicked.

member.summary: Called when the is clicked.

member.summary: Called when the is clicked.

member.summary: Called when the is clicked.

member.summary: Called when the is clicked.

member.summary: Represents root element of a control.

member.summary: Gets the height of the panel with the camera controls.
